name: revit_place_family_with_options
description: Places a family instance using FaceBasedPlacementType or sketch-based FamilyPlacementOptions.

placement_mode.description: Whether to use face-based or sketch-based placement options

face_placement_type.description: FaceBasedPlacementType name when placement_mode is face_based

notes: Replace OptionsForm and PromptForFamilyInstancePlacement with direct NewFamilyInstance or scripted picks.
